name: tests-are-specs
description: tests-are-specs: the tests are the spec. Three skills, scoping, building-from-plans, and verifying-work.

plugins.name: tests-are-specs
plugins.description: tests-are-specs: the tests are the spec, so there is no prose spec to rot. The human's intent becomes a contract of complete tests marked expected-failure, each asserting an independently derived outcome, so CI stays green while the contract is reviewed; the build removes markers and makes them pass; an independent fresh-context review checks that the contract diff is marker-removal only. Ships scoping (explore the change, interview the human, author a contract test per requirement, write a short plan and an ADR receipt), building-from-plans (make each contract test pass in turn-efficient tasks, refactor on green, prove each against real behavior, conventional commits), and verifying-work (audit the diff against the plan and its contract, PASS/FAIL). The code and its tests are the only source of truth.
